sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n55900" key="katefqo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κατεφθός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n55900.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">boiled</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philum.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg009:12" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.12</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
